prompt:
Theme: Sky Blue Ramune Day

Subject: A woman in her 20s smiling with a Ramune soda on a midsummer urban building rooftop. Standing slightly to the right of the center in a 2:3 vertical frame, captured from the head to the upper thighs. The person occupies about 70% of the screen, leaving a wide margin of vibrant blue sky at the top. White wireless headphones around the neck, a pale blue drink in a transparent cup, and floating white hand-drawn style musical notes and stars serve as visual accents.

Person/Expression: Bright ivory-beige skin with natural pink color and delicate texture. Soft highlights from the summer sun on cheeks, tip of the nose, shoulders, and collarbones. Pale rose-pink blush, champagne beige and pink-brown eye makeup, long thin eyelashes, natural tear bags, soft brown eyebrows, and sheer pink-beige lips. A bright smile with the mouth slightly open, face turned slightly toward the upper left of the screen, and gaze also directed diagonally upward. Small, clear catchlights in the eyes. Hair is bright milk tea ash brown. Thin see-through bangs, layers around the face, medium-long reaching below the shoulders. Hair ends are loosely curled inward, with thin strands and natural wisps swaying slightly in the summer air. Each strand, soft shine, and thin highlights are carefully depicted.

Clothing/Pose: A white fine-ribbed square-neck camisole with a translucent thin white shirt draped loosely over the shoulders. Bottoms are light sky blue lightweight shorts with a white drawstring at the waist. A healthy, adult-like natural physique and a calm, feminine silhouette. Holding a transparent cup on the right side of the screen at chest height with her left hand, and lightly bringing the tip of a straw near her lips with her right fingertips. A relaxed standing posture with hips shifted slightly to the left and a slight difference in shoulder height. Accurately depict the contact between fingers, cup, and straw.

Background/Light: A rooftop of a building in an urban area of Japan. Metal safety railings in the middle ground, low to mid-rise buildings and thin power lines in the background, with no text or logos. The sky is a highly saturated clear blue with small white cumulus clouds on the left and bottom. Inside the transparent cup are ice, fine carbonated bubbles, and pale light blue Ramune soda, with cold condensation on the cup surface. The main light is harsh daylight from the upper left. Brightly illuminating the cheeks, shoulders, arms, and top of the cup, casting soft shadows under the chin and inside the shirt. Add thin reflections from the blue sky to the skin and white clothes.

Composition/Camera: Vertical 2:3 position, a low angle looking up from a slightly low position. Natural perspective equivalent to 35-50mm. Focus accurately on the person's face and lightly blur the background buildings. About 15% margin above the head, with hand-drawn white stars, musical notes, and short lines scattered on the left and right, and a white rough outline placed along the person's silhouette.

Theme: Sky Blue Ramune Day

Subject: A woman in her 20s smiling with a Ramune soda on a midsummer urban building rooftop. Standing slightly to the right of the center in a 2:3 vertical frame, captured from the head to the upper thighs. The person occupies about 70% of the screen, leaving a wide margin of vibrant blue sky at the top. promptZh:
主题：天蓝色弹珠汽水之日

主体：一位 20 多岁的女性，带着微笑，手持 弹珠汽水，身处 仲夏城市建筑屋顶。画面为 2:3 纵向构图，人物位于中心偏右，取景范围从头部到大腿上部。人物占据画面约 70% 的比例，顶部留有大面积鲜艳的蓝天作为留白。颈部挂着白色无线耳机，手中拿着装有淡蓝色饮料的透明杯子，画面中漂浮着手绘风格的白色音符和星星作为视觉点缀。

人物/表情：明亮的象牙米色皮肤，带有自然的红润感和细腻的质感。夏日阳光在脸颊、鼻尖、肩膀和锁骨处投下柔和的高光。淡玫瑰粉色腮红，香槟米色与粉棕色眼妆，长而纤细的睫毛，自然的卧蚕，柔和的棕色眉毛，以及清透的粉米色嘴唇。嘴角微张，露出灿烂的笑容，脸部微微转向画面左上方，视线也斜向上方。眼中带有清晰的小巧高光。发色为明亮的奶茶灰棕色。轻薄的空气刘海，脸颊两侧有层次感，中长发垂至肩下。发梢向内微卷，细碎的发丝在夏日的微风中轻轻飘动。每一缕发丝、柔和的光泽和纤细的高光都经过精心刻画。

服装/姿势：身穿白色细罗纹方领吊带背心，肩上随意披着一件半透明的薄款白衬衫。下身穿着浅天蓝色轻便短裤，腰间系有白色抽绳。展现出健康、成熟且自然的体态，以及柔美的轮廓。左手在画面右侧胸部高度握住透明杯子，右手手指轻触吸管尖端，将其靠近唇边。姿势放松，臀部微微向左倾斜，双肩高度略有差异。准确描绘手指、杯子与吸管之间的接触细节。

背景/光影：日本城市区域的建筑屋顶。中景为金属安全护栏，背景为中低层建筑和细长的电线，画面中无任何文字或标志。天空为高饱和度的清澈蓝色，左侧和底部点缀着少量白色积云。透明杯中装有冰块、细密的气泡和淡浅蓝色的弹珠汽水，杯壁上凝结着冷凝水珠。主光源为来自左上方的强烈日光。明亮地照亮脸颊、肩膀、手臂和杯口，在下巴下方和衬衫内侧投下柔和的阴影。皮肤和白色衣物上带有来自蓝天的细微反射光。

构图/相机：2:3 纵向构图，采用略微仰视的低角度拍摄。相当于 35-50mm 的自然透视效果。焦点准确对准人物面部，背景建筑轻微虚化。头部上方留有约 15% 的空间，画面左右散布着手绘风格的白色星星、音符和短线条，人物轮廓边缘带有白色的粗线条勾勒。
